_comment: Section → slide_prefix mapping for the --sections CLI flag and the UI multi-select (Phase 17.1). Keys are section names used in UI/CLI. slide_prefixes match against the lowercased prefix of slide_id (before '-' or '.'), consistent with _SECTION_MAP in output/deck_builder.py.

_status_legend.active: Wired into build_deck section grouping. Selecting this section in the UI yields slides.
_status_legend.routed_elsewhere: Slides exist but build_deck distributes them INTO another section (see notes). Selecting alone yields no divider+slides until routing is changed.
_status_legend.aspirational: Defined in this registry but not yet wired into build_deck section grouping. Currently rolls up under a parent section in _SECTION_MAP.

overview.description: Portfolio composition, eligibility, and program scope

dctr.description: Current penetration, where opportunity sits, and what closing the gap is worth

rege.description: Opt-in rates, branch variation, and revenue impact of Reg E enrollment

attrition.description: Who is leaving, what it costs, and where retention efforts should focus

mailer.description: Campaign response rates, cohort lift, and mailer program ROI

value.description: Revenue attribution — what a debit card and Reg E opt-in are worth
value._note: build_deck() distributes A11.1 into dctr and A11.2 into rege; the value section has no standalone slides at runtime. Selecting 'value' alone returns nothing until routing changes.

ics.description: Invitation Checking System acquisition channels and conversion

insights.description: Synthesis, recommendations, and quantified action plan

txn._comment: TXN sub-sections are aspirational — _SECTION_MAP currently lumps every TXN prefix under one 'transaction' section. Wiring build_deck to honor these subsections is a follow-up.

transaction.description: Every TXN slide rolls up here today

txn_general.description: Portfolio KPIs, demographics, ARS swipe segmentation

txn_competition.description: Competitor detection, wallet share, CU/bank audit

txn_campaign.description: Mailer + cohort lift from transaction data
